name: spectacular
description: AI-native operational workspace for software projects. Stop losing context. Start shipping.

interface.longDescription: Spectacular is an AI-native operational workspace for software projects. It separates strategy (PRD), system spec (what's built), and active work (requests) into a .spectacular/ directory that both humans and coding agents can navigate. Ships as a directory convention, a /spectacular Claude Code skill, and a spectacular init CLI bootstrap tool.
